title: Phison is now demanding customers pre-pay with shorter timelines NAND squeeze affecting everyone in the SSD supply chain
summary: Phison, a major SSD controller supplier, is now demanding customers pay upfront, with shorter payment timelines, due to the NAND squeeze affecting the SSD supply chain.
insight: NAND shortage triggers Phison to demand upfront payment and tighter deadlines.

title: Nvidia s RTX 5070 seemingly crushes memory shortages to reign supreme as Steam s number one GPU but there are questions about why
summary: The GeForce RTX 5070 has become Steam's most popular GPU, but its dominance raises methodological concerns.
insight: Nvidia's RTX 5070 surges to top Steam GPU position unexpectedly.

title: Nvidia releases new GeForce 595.71 driver to fix serious fan control bug new update resolves issues for RTX 30, 40, and 50-series GPUs that reportedly stopped some fans from working
summary: Nvidia released a new driver update (595.71) to fix a fan control bug affecting RTX 30, 40, and 50-series GPUs. The issue was caused by a previously recalled driver (595.59). The update aims to resolve the problem and restore fan functionality.
insight: Critical driver update resolves major fan control issue for Nvidia GPUs.

title: Transcend 260S 2TB SSD Review: A Dependable Alternative PCIe 5.0 Contender
summary: The Transcend 260S delivers consistent performance in a reliable package, making it a dependable alternative for those seeking a PCIe 5.0 SSD. While it may not set records, its consistent performance is a notable achievement. This is particularly important for those requiring a stable storage solution.
insight: Consistency over raw performance makes this SSD a practical choice.

title: Exploring the future of Artificial Intelligence today's models, tomorrow's agents, and the big privacy problem
summary: Artificial Intelligence is evolving rapidly with complex models and emerging risks. Large Language Models (LLMs) are the current benchmark, but future AI agents will integrate more features and raise privacy concerns. Companies are racing to develop and deploy these advancements.
insight: AI's future hinges on balancing progress and user data protection.

title: ISSCC 2026: Rebellions details industry's first quad-chiplet AI solution with UCIe interconnects claims Rebel100 AI accelerator equals the power of Nvidia H200 with lower power envelope
summary: Rebellions unveiled the world's first quad-chiplet AI accelerator with UCIe interconnects, outperforming Nvidia H200 with lower power consumption.
insight: Quad-chiplet design enables more efficient AI acceleration and reduced power costs.

title: Entry-level PC market to disappear by 2028 rising memory prices pile more strain on consumer PC market
summary: Rising memory prices will push PC prices up 17% by 2026, wiping out the sub-$500 PC market. This surge in prices is expected to be 130% by the end of 2026. PC makers may struggle to maintain profit margins as costs increase.
insight: Rising memory prices threaten consumer PC market affordability

title: Starlink Mobile teases 5G speeds from space with 100x the data density V2 satellites are being sent into orbit to power the upgrade
summary: Starlink Mobile is upgrading to 5G speeds from space with a significant increase in data density.
insight: Revolutionizing mobile internet with unprecedented high-speed, high-density connectivity.

title: Grab this awesome 4K-ready gaming PC with a 7800X3D and RX 9070 XT for under $1,750 $150 saving on powerful all-AMD rig with 32GB of DDR RAM and a spacious 2TB SSD
summary: Get a powerful all-AMD gaming PC with a 7800X3D and RX 9070 XT for $1,749.99. This PC features 32GB of DDR RAM and a 2TB SSD. The deal offers a $150 saving.
insight: High-performance gaming at an affordable price point with significant savings.

title: Cave-inspired 3D printed Japanese home touted as earthquake resistant two-story house first of its kind to be granted seismic compliance certificate
summary: Japan has approved its first 2-story 3D printed 'cave-inspired' home, designed to be earthquake-resistant. This innovative construction method aims to provide a sustainable and secure housing solution. The home has been granted seismic compliance certification.
insight: Advancing disaster-resilient housing through revolutionary 3D printing technology

title: Save $190 when you bundle AMD's new 9850X3D CPU, Gigabyte X870 motherboard, and fast 1TB SN850X SSD for $839 Newegg's new SSD bundles get you an SSD priced at $319 for just $129
summary: Newegg offers a combo bundle including a Ryzen 7 9850X3D CPU, Gigabyte X870 motherboard, and 1TB WD Black SN850X SSD for $839, offering a potential savings of $190.
insight: Significant cost savings through bundled hardware purchases.

title: Quectel RM255C mid-tier 5G RedCap M.2 and LGA modules support LTE Cat 4 fallback, multi-constellation GNSS
summary: Quectel has released two 5G RedCap modules, RM255C-GL and RG255C-NA, supporting 5G Sub-6GHz SA with LTE Cat 4 fallback, multi-constellation GNSS, and various interfaces. These modules cater to industrial IoT, smart grids, and medium-speed applications. They offer backward compatibility with Rel-15/16 networks.
insight: Bridge gap between LTE and full-featured 5G capabilities

title: Nordic Semi nRF93M1 IoT modules offer LTE Cat 1bis cellular connectivity, Wi-Fi location capabilities
summary: Nordic Semiconductors introduced the nRF93M1 LTE Cat 1bis IoT modules with up to 10 Mbps downlink and 5 Mbps uplink, as well as built-in Wi-Fi location capabilities. Two variants will be offered: the nRF93M1-LABA and the nRF93M1-LACA. These modules support various features like secure firmware updates and power-saving features.
insight: Enhanced IoT capabilities for global connectivity and location-based services

title: Qualcomm Wi-Fi 8 solutions FastConnect 8800 Mobile Client and Qualcomm Dragonwing Networking Platforms
summary: Qualcomm has unveiled its Wi-Fi 8 portfolio, including the FastConnect 8800 Mobile Client and five Dragonwing Networking platforms. The FastConnect 8800 offers Wi-Fi 8, Bluetooth 7, UWB, and Thread capabilities. The Dragonwing platforms cater to various use cases, from enterprise access points to fiber broadband CPEs.
insight: Enhanced wireless capabilities for improved performance and connectivity experiences

title: GEEKOM A5 Pro 2026 Edition Review Part 2: An AMD Ryzen 5 7530U mini PC tested with Windows 11 Pro
summary: The GEEKOM A5 Pro 2026 Edition mini PC with an AMD Ryzen 5 7530U processor is reviewed, testing features, benchmarks, and performance with Windows 11 Pro. The review covers software, hardware, and networking performance, cooling system, and power consumption. The results provide an in-depth look at the mini PC's capabilities and limitations.
insight: Performance of mini PCs rivals traditional desktop PCs in certain areas

title: Round three: More Rising Stars 2026
summary: The Fierce Sensors Rising Stars 2026 program recognizes innovators in sensors and related technologies, highlighting their creativity, expertise, and impact. This program showcases emerging talent driving advancements in the field. The expanding group features individuals making significant contributions to sensors and related tech.
insight: Accelerating innovation in sensors drives transformative technologies and industries

title: Microsoft blocks the word 'Microslop' in Copilot Discord, and the server melts down
summary: Microsoft's Copilot Discord blocks the word 'Microslop,' sparking user backlash and screenshots on social media. This incident raises concerns about censorship and freedom of speech. Users were unable to post the word, receiving a 'prohibited phrase' notice.
insight: Free speech vs. corporate control in AI-powered online spaces

title: Claude is the top free app on iPhone right now, and the Pentagon drama is basically why
summary: Claude rose to top spot on iPhone, surpassing ChatGPT and Gemini.
insight: Pentagon drama sparks intense user interest in AI chat apps.

title: A stolen Gemini API key turned a $180 bill into $82,000 in two days
summary: A compromised Google Cloud API key turned a $180 bill into $82,000 in two days after being used to access Gemini services.
insight: Unauthorized API access can lead to significant financial losses quickly.

title: Apple's iPad Air gets M4 performance upgrade without price increase
summary: Apple's iPad Air gets a performance upgrade with the M4 chip, delivering up to 30% faster performance compared to last year's M3. This upgrade also offers a significant improvement over older Apple M1 chip devices. The upgrade from M3 to M4 is more incremental.
insight: Significant boost in performance for older Apple devices

title: AirPods 4 with ANC drop to $119, near their lowest price ever
summary: AirPods 4 now available with ANC for $119, a near-lowest price ever.
insight: Affordable option for Apple ecosystem users without Pro features.

title: Apple unveils iPhone 17e with A19 chip and MagSafe charging starting at $599
summary: Apple's iPhone 17e boasts a 6.1-inch OLED display with 1,200 nits brightness, improved anti-reflective coating, and Apple Ceramic Shield 2 protection, starting at $599.
insight: Enhanced display technology for improved visual experiences.

title: 390TB game archive Myrient to shut down as storage costs surge
summary: Myrient, a massive 390TB game archive, will shut down due to rising storage costs. The service will cease to exist on March 31, 2026, and hundreds of terabytes of gaming data will be lost. This comes as storage and hosting costs have sharply increased.
insight: Digital preservation threatened by unsustainable storage costs and hosting fees.

title: Porsche turns a Resident Evil meme into a real-life racetrack stunt
summary: Porsche turned a Resident Evil meme into a real-life racetrack stunt, showcasing a custom Cayenne Turbo GT. The stunt was inspired by the game's reveal trailer. The car was designed to embody the game's post-apocalyptic atmosphere.
insight: Brands can leverage memes to create engaging, attention-grabbing marketing campaigns.

title: Samsung updates TV software to clarify how it tracks what you watch
summary: Samsung updates TV software to clarify its automated content tracking feature, Automated Content Recognition (ACR), which scans and identifies content in real-time.
insight: Samsung clarifies TV software's intrusive content tracking methods publicly now.

title: Motorola Razr Fold debuts with Snapdragon 8 Gen 5, 6,000mAh battery, and hefty 2,000 price tag
summary: The Motorola Razr Fold boasts a Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 processor and features a 6,000mAh battery. It comes with up to 16GB of memory and 1TB of storage, and has a basic level of dust and water resistance. The device is priced at a hefty 2,000.
insight: High-end specs at a premium price point expected

title: Lenovo's AI Workmate concept puts a desk robot with a projector in your office
summary: Lenovo unveiled the AI Workmate concept, a desk robot with AI and projection, and the AI Work Companion concept, a stationary desktop assistant with AI-driven scheduling. Together, they aim to enhance office productivity and collaboration. Both concepts integrate conversational AI and AI-driven features.
insight: Revolutionizing office workflow with intelligent AI-powered desk assistants

title: Lenovo's Legion Go Fold concept turns into a handheld, a wide tablet, a vertical screen, and a tiny laptop
summary: Lenovo's Legion Go Fold is a versatile device with a folding screen that can transform into various form factors.
insight: Seamless screen transformation enables multiple uses from a single device.

title: Gartner says sub-$500 PCs could disappear by 2028 due to RAM crisis
summary: Gartner predicts a decline in PC and smartphone shipments in 2026 due to rising RAM costs, with sub-$500 PCs potentially disappearing by 2028.
insight: Soaring memory costs threaten mass-market PC affordability and accessibility models.

title: Star Wars heads back to cinemas with two back-to-back films
summary: Star Wars returns to cinemas with two new films, including Starfighter, directed by Shawn Levy. Early showings of footage have impressed studio observers, who praise Gosling's performance and Levy's ability to capture the 'spirit of fun' from the original series. The films promise to bring back the series' signature fun.
insight: Star Wars revives its 'spirit of fun' in new cinematic releases.

title: Steam's hardware survey just flipped: new top GPU, Windows 11 crashes, Chinese takes the lead
summary: Steam's hardware survey has released new results showing a change in the top GPU due to a recent fix. The issue, which affected VRAM reporting, has been resolved. Windows 11 crashes also appear to be on the rise.
insight: Fixing VRAM reporting leads to changes in Steam's GPU rankings.

title: Insider says Sony is scaling back PC releases for first-party PlayStation games
summary: Sony is reportedly scaling back PC releases for its first-party PlayStation games, prioritizing console exclusives instead.
insight: Shift away from PC ports impacts Sony's multi-platform revenue strategy

title: AMD announces Ryzen AI 400 desktop chips with Zen 5, RDNA 3.5, and an XDNA 2 NPU
summary: AMD announces Ryzen AI 400 desktop chips with AI acceleration capabilities. The new Ryzen AI 400 Series and Ryzen AI PRO 400 Series desktop processors pair Zen 5 CPU cores with RDNA 3.5 integrated graphics and an XDNA 2 NPU. This is AMD's first 'AI PC' desktop lineup.
insight: AI acceleration integrated into mainstream desktop processors

title: What happens when you try to power a desktop PC with 56 AA batteries?
summary: A desktop PC was attempted to be powered by 56 AA batteries, but it failed due to insufficient power supply. The system drew its power through a custom ATX plug. The hardware consisted of an entry-level Intel processor and a 2.5-inch SATA SSD.
insight: Relying on battery power is impractical for high power computing devices.
